6.Finally I don’t have huge name and clout like many great
gurus in the astrology have. This has taken away a lot of
pressure of my head. This has immensely helped me to
concentrate on predictions. In terms of predictions,
volume, area and range I can easily be in the top slot.
.
7.Do not put down others. Many astrologers do not want to
even recognize other astrologer who do good work or

appreciate other people effort. This will have karmic
impact in the long run.
8.Do not try to copy prediction. This is the fastest way to
ruin your consciousness and confidence. See the other areas
were you could come up with brilliants prediction. In the
long run hard work is no substitute for copycatting.
